principle1.description: The best automation doesn't replace people — it helps them do more. Every feature we build keeps you in control.

principle2.description: If you can't see what happened, you can't trust it. Every action has a record — logs, screenshots, and timestamps.

principle3.description: Your data shouldn't leave your computer. No internet needed, no data sent elsewhere. Complete control over your information.
principle3.title: Runs on Your Computer, Not the Cloud

belief1.description: Every Flyto2 workflow can pause, let you check, and continue at any step.

belief2.description: Human approval steps are a core part of the system, not something added on later.

belief3.description: Go back to the last good point, fix the issue, and continue. No need to start everything over.

belief4.description: Every action, every decision, every approval is saved and timestamped.
belief4.title: A full record of what happened is not optional

mission.description: Automation should help people, not replace them. We believe in tools that make you more capable while keeping you in control.
mission.statement: To make powerful automation accessible to everyone, while keeping things transparent and under your control.
mission.title: Our Mission

hero.description: We're building the future of workflow automation — transparent, trustworthy, and people-first.
hero.title: About Flyto2

allOrNothing.title: All or Nothing
allOrNothing.desc: Most tools run everything at once. If something goes wrong halfway through 1,000 items, you don't find out until the damage is done.

noApproval.title: No Way to Pause for Approval
noApproval.desc: Sometimes a person needs to review and approve before the next step runs. Most tools can't pause and wait — they just keep going.

validation.title: Bad Data Slips Through
validation.desc: When data doesn't look right — wrong format, missing fields — most tools just keep going. You end up with bad results and no idea where it went wrong.

cloud.title: Your Data Goes to the Cloud
cloud.desc: Some data shouldn't leave your computer or your company's network. But most automation tools require an internet connection and store your data somewhere else.

problem.subtitle: Most automation tools have a fundamental problem: once you hit "run", you lose control.
problem.title: Problems Other Tools

step1.title: Check Before Running
step1.desc: Before each step runs, Flyto2 checks that the data looks right. If something is missing or wrong, it stops and tells you.

step2.title: Keep Data Consistent
step2.desc: Data moving between steps must match what's expected. No surprises, no silent failures.

step3.title: Verify the Results
step3.desc: After each step finishes, the results are checked. If anything looks off, you'll know right away.

step4.title: Save Progress Along the Way
step4.desc: Flyto2 saves progress as it goes. If something fails later, you can go back to the last save point instead of starting over.

validation.subtitle: Most automation failures aren't about broken logic — they're about bad data that nobody caught in time.
validation.title: Why Checking Data Should Be

approval.title: Human Approval Steps
approval.desc: Add approval steps anywhere in your workflow. The system pauses and waits for a person to confirm before moving on.

rollback.title: Go Back & Continue
rollback.desc: Made a mistake? Go back to the last good point, fix it, and continue from there. No need to start over.

builtin.title: Built-in Data Checking
builtin.desc: Flyto2 checks the data at every step. If something doesn't look right, it stops immediately and tells you what's wrong — before it causes problems.

offline.title: Works 100% Offline
offline.desc: Flyto2 runs entirely on your computer. No internet needed. Your data never leaves your machine.

audit.title: Full Record of Every Step
audit.desc: Every step is recorded with screenshots, logs, and timestamps. You can always go back and see exactly what happened.

pause.title: Pause Anytime
pause.desc: Run one item first. Check if it's correct. Then run the rest. You're always in control of when things move forward.

solution.subtitle: Flyto2 is built so that automation and human judgment work together, not against each other.
solution.title: Designed for People Who Need to

apiTable.title: Flyto2 vs API-Based Tools
apiTable.note: API-based tools are great for connecting cloud apps through webhooks and APIs. Flyto2 shines when you need to automate what you see on screen — clicking buttons, filling forms, reading pages — with the ability to pause and check at any step.

rpaTable.title: Flyto2 vs Traditional Automation Platforms
rpaTable.note: Traditional enterprise automation platforms are built for large teams with big budgets and dedicated IT support. Flyto2 is built for people and teams who want to get started quickly, stay in control, and keep things simple.

insight.title: Key Insight
insight.desc: The best automation isn't fully automatic. It's automation that knows its limits and asks for help when it needs to.

step2.label: Check:
step2.text: Verify each record against your rules

step3.label: Pause:
step3.text: Flag unusual amounts, missing info, or duplicates

step4.label: Review:
step4.text: A person reviews flagged items and decides what to do

step5.label: Continue:
step5.text: Process approved items, skip rejected ones

hitl.subtitle: Automation that pauses at critical moments for a person to check
hitl.problem: Automation works great for 95% of cases. But that 5% can cause real damage if handled automatically. You need automation that knows when to stop and ask a person.
hitl.title: Human-in-the-Loop Automation
hitl.when1: High-value transactions above a certain amount
hitl.when2: Data that doesn't match expected patterns
hitl.when5: Any action that's hard to undo

balance.title: The Right Balance
balance.desc: AI should help people work faster, not make decisions for them. Flyto2 is designed with this principle at its core.

ai.approachDesc: AI is powerful but not perfect. Flyto2 lets AI do the heavy lifting while keeping people in charge of the final call.

step2.label: AI reads:
step2.text: Extract vendor name, amount, items, due date

step3.label: Flag:
step3.text: Highlight anything AI isn't sure about

step4.label: Review:
step4.text: A person checks flagged items and corrects if needed

step5.label: Done:
step5.text: Create the payment entry and send for approval

ai.subtitle: Let AI do the work, let people make the calls

gettingStarted.subtitle: How to start using Flyto2
gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.a1: Flyto2 works on Mac, Windows, and Linux computers. It's designed to be lightweight, so even older machines can run it smoothly. For most tasks, you just need a regular computer - no special hardware required.
gettingStarted.a2: Just four simple steps: (1) Click "Record" to start capturing your actions, (2) Do the task you want to automate - click, type, copy, paste as you normally would, (3) Click "Stop" when you're done, (4) Give your recording a name and save it. That's it! Flyto2 learned what you did and can repeat it anytime.
gettingStarted.a3: Flyto2 works with websites, desktop applications, and file operations. It can interact with your browser, spreadsheets, documents, email, and most programs on your computer. If you can click it or type in it, Flyto2 can probably automate it.
gettingStarted.a4: Yes! You can schedule any recorded task to run at specific times - daily, weekly, or at custom intervals. Set it up once and let Flyto2 handle the rest. You can also trigger tasks based on events, like when a file appears in a folder.
gettingStarted.q1: What devices does Flyto2 work on?
gettingStarted.q2: How do I record my first task?
gettingStarted.q3: Can Flyto2 work with any application?
gettingStarted.q4: Can I schedule tasks to run automatically?

licensing.subtitle: Plans, pricing, and license management
licensing.title: Licensing & Pricing
licensing.a1: The free plan lets you try Flyto2 with basic recording and playback features. It's perfect for getting started and testing if Flyto2 works for your needs. You can record tasks, play them back, and experience the core functionality before deciding if you want more.
licensing.a2: Yes! Start with the free plan, and upgrade whenever you're ready. You can switch between plans at any time. When you upgrade, you get instant access to new features. There's no lock-in - you're in control.
licensing.a3: Yes! We offer discounts for students, educators, non-profits, and teams. Contact us at sales@flyto2.com to learn about available programs and pricing options for your situation.
licensing.q1: What's included in the free plan?
licensing.q2: Can I upgrade my plan later?

general.subtitle: Learn the basics about Flyto2
general.title: General Questions
general.a1: Flyto2 is an automation tool that operates your computer like a human. Instead of writing code or learning complicated tools, you simply record your actions and Flyto2 learns to repeat them for you. It's designed to handle the tedious, repetitive tasks that steal your time - copying data, filling forms, moving files between apps - so you can focus on work that actually matters.
general.a2: No coding required! Flyto2 is designed for everyone, not just developers. If you can click and type, you can use Flyto2. Simply record yourself doing a task once, and Flyto2 learns to repeat it. There's no programming, no scripting, no technical setup - just show and go.
general.a3: Unlike other tools, Flyto2 lets you pause, verify, and resume at any step. You always stay in control - check what it's about to do, correct mistakes before they happen, and resume exactly where you left off.
general.a4: Absolutely. Flyto2 takes a safety-first approach. Your data is processed securely and never shared with third parties. We use encryption and strict access controls to keep your information protected at every step. We believe automation should help you, not expose you to risks.
general.q2: Do I need to know how to code?
general.q3: How is Flyto2 different from other automation tools?
general.q4: Is my data safe with Flyto2?

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your cloud plan at any time. For offline licenses, you can upgrade by paying the difference.
faq.a2: Your workflows continue to work indefinitely. You only lose access to updates and support. Renew anytime to get the latest features.
faq.a3: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans. No questions asked.
faq.a4: Absolutely! The open source core is MIT licensed. You can use it for any purpose, including commercial projects.
